title: I celebrate every flow of fresh income
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for building gratitude for money that arrives steadily rather than all at once.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 49 of the MONEY program. For when you're in growth but the habit is to discount small streams while waiting for one large one.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 49 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the end of any week where income arrived in small or unexpected ways — to train the habit of noticing.

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 49 of the MONEY program. The line works with the habit of bypassing steady income: new clients, small sales, unexpected payments — while measuring progress only by one large goal.
I see money arriving from everywhere. I appreciate every payment and profit. I celebrate every new flow of fresh income.
Say it three times. Before the last pass, name one specific payment or income stream from this week, however small. Then say the affirmation for that.
Adapted from Day 49 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
